$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for coverage-agent responses (Story 7.2-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; extra fields allowed for forward-compat.
title: CoverageAgentResponse
description: Structured result returned by a coverage agent dispatched by the orchestrator.

pr_number.description: Pull request number, when the agent opened one. Optional since Story 27.3-001: the controller opens the change request deterministically after the coverage stage.

pr_url.description: URL of the pull request, when the agent opened one. Optional since Story 27.3-001.

tests_added.description: Number of tests the agent added.

sast_status.description: SAST (semgrep) scan outcome (Story 9.1-001). CLEAN->PASS, WARN->WARN, BLOCK->FAIL. Optional for backward compatibility.

dep_scan_status.description: Dependency (osv-scanner) scan outcome (Story 9.1-002). CLEAN->PASS, WARN->WARN, BLOCK->FAIL. Optional for backward compatibility.
